agentic RAG.name: agents
agentic RAG.description: Multi-agent system built with Claude and MCP featuring 7 specialized agents (chatbot, security researcher, business advisor, task manager, REST API), 29 shared tools   across web analysis, memory, RAG, email, and communication. Includes hot-reload development, OAuth infrastructure, and remote MCP support for distributed deployments.

agentic RAG.name: airbyte-agent-connectors
agentic RAG.description: 🐙 Drop-in tools that give AI agents reliable, permission-aware access to external systems.

agentic RAG.name: fakenewsoff
agentic RAG.description: Agentic AI system using Amazon Nova for claim extraction, RAG-based evidence retrieval, FirstDraft mis/disinformation classification, and deepfake-aware media verification. Chrome extension + serverless AWS backend.

agentic RAG.name: Distill
agentic RAG.description: Distill — Turn any URL into clean, structured data for AI pipelines, RAG systems, and intelligent agents.

agentic RAG.name: AI-QA-60Days
agentic RAG.description: 60天AI质量保障实战训练营 - 从测试工程师视角系统掌握LLM测试方法论 涵盖：温度参数验证、Prompt注入防御、RAG评估、Agent自动化测试等企业级实战内容

agentic RAG.name: ai-invoice-auditor
agentic RAG.description: Agentic AI-powered multilingual invoice validation system using LangGraph, LangChain, and RAG

agentic RAG.name: obrew-studio-server
agentic RAG.description: Obrew Server: A self-hostable machine learning engine. Build agents and schedule workflows private to you.

agentic RAG.name: Customer_Support_Agent
agentic RAG.description: An autonomous multi-agent customer support system using CrewAI for research, QA validation, and RAG-based documentation retrieval.

agentic RAG.name: MakerAi
agentic RAG.description: The AI Operating System for Delphi. 100% native framework with RAG 2.0 for knowledge retrieval, autonomous agents with semantic memory, visual workflow orchestration, and universal LLM connector. Supports OpenAI, Claude, Gemini, Ollama, and more. Enterprise-grade AI for Delphi 10.3+

agentic RAG.name: promptfoo
agentic RAG.description: Test your prompts, agents, and RAGs. AI Red teaming, pentesting, and vulnerability scanning for LLMs. Compare performance of GPT, Claude, Gemini, Llama, and more. Simple declarative configs with command line and CI/CD integration.

AI agent memory.name: veritas_os
AI agent memory.description: VERITAS OS is an auditable decision infrastructure for LLM agents. Each decision runs through a deterministic pipeline: Evidence → Critique → Debate → Plan → FUJI safety gate → ValueCore → TrustLog.  Designed to make AI decisions reviewable, traceable, and accountable inside real organizational workflows.

AI agent memory.name: echo
AI agent memory.description: A persistent long-term memory engine for AI agents. Bridges stateless LLMs with local SQLite persistence via MCP to automate cross-session architectural context and project preferences.

AI agent memory.name: RTS
AI agent memory.description: ai-agents llm-ai gpt-workflows ai-audit execution-logging ai-research reproducibility observability provenance ai-operations research-infrastructure operational-memory

AI agent memory.name: CodyBackUp
AI agent memory.description: Cody OpenClaw workspace backup - AI agent configuration and memories

AI agent memory.name: termo-agent
AI agent memory.description: Open-source serverless runtime for AI agents. Bring any framework, get a production HTTP server with SSE streaming, sessions, auth, and memory.

AI agent memory.name: agenticana
AI agent memory.description: Self-learning AI agent kit for VS Code & GitHub Copilot - 20 agents, ReasoningBank memory, Model Router

AI agent memory.name: MakerAi
AI agent memory.description: The AI Operating System for Delphi. 100% native framework with RAG 2.0 for knowledge retrieval, autonomous agents with semantic memory, visual workflow orchestration, and universal LLM connector. Supports OpenAI, Claude, Gemini, Ollama, and more. Enterprise-grade AI for Delphi 10.3+

AI agent memory.name: openclawbrain
AI agent memory.description: Memory graph for AI agents that learns what to retrieve — and what to suppress. Formerly CrabPath.

AI agent memory.name: NovaSpine
AI agent memory.description: Cognitive Memory System for AI Agents — learning compression + searchable recall

AI agent memory.name: atlas
AI agent memory.description: A programming language built from scratch to be the best language for AI to write — with an explicit ownership model so agents don't have to   guess at memory semantics, and a trajectory toward systems-level performance.

LLM memory management.name: memory-indexer
LLM memory management.description: Memory System for LLMs for Conversation Context Management

LLM memory management.name: Supervertaler
LLM memory management.description: Open-source, AI-enhanced CAT tool with multi-LLM support, translation memory, glossary management, Superbench translation quality benchmarking, ‘Superlookup’ concordance across TMs/glossaries/web resources, voice commands, and seamless integration with leading CAT tools. Experimental Okapi Framework sidecar for industrial-strength file extraction.

LLM memory management.name: langgraph-checkpoint-neo4j-js
LLM memory management.description: 💾 Enable LangGraph agents to persist conversations using Neo4j's graph database for reliable state storage and easy management across restarts.

LLM memory management.name: ABMemory
LLM memory management.description: 🧠 Elevate AI with ABMemory, a robust memory layer that offers adaptive storage, context-aware retrieval, and complete lifecycle management for lasting insights.

LLM memory management.name: storage-scale-agents
LLM memory management.description: 🤖 Simplify IBM Storage Scale management with an AI agent that translates natural language requests into efficient, specialized actions.

LLM memory management.name: reasonkit-mem
LLM memory management.description: 🚀 Build memory and retrieval infrastructure for ReasonKit, enhancing data management and access for your applications with ease and efficiency.

LLM memory management.name: prompt-for-code
LLM memory management.description: 🔧 Streamline AI agents with this flexible prompt template and task specification project for effective instruction and memory management.

LLM memory management.name: Projects-and-more-
LLM memory management.description: is a self-improving memory layer for LLM applications, offering both cloud and open-source solutions to enable personalized AI experiences, memory CRUD, vector store integration, and scalable memory management with asynchronous API support.

LLM memory management.name: gobby
LLM memory management.description: A local-first daemon to unify your AI coding tools. Session tracking and handoffs across Claude Code, Gemini CLI, and Codex. An MCP proxy that discovers tools without flooding context. Task management with dependencies, validation, and TDD expansion. Agent spawning and worktree orchestration. Persistent memory, extensible workflows, and hooks.

LLM memory management.name: AGiXT
LLM memory management.description: AGiXT is a dynamic AI Agent Automation Platform that seamlessly orchestrates instruction management and complex task execution across diverse AI providers. Combining adaptive memory, smart features, and a versatile plugin system, AGiXT delivers efficient and comprehensive AI solutions.

memory system LLM.name: agents
memory system LLM.description: Multi-agent system built with Claude and MCP featuring 7 specialized agents (chatbot, security researcher, business advisor, task manager, REST API), 29 shared tools   across web analysis, memory, RAG, email, and communication. Includes hot-reload development, OAuth infrastructure, and remote MCP support for distributed deployments.

memory system LLM.name: memory-indexer
memory system LLM.description: Memory System for LLMs for Conversation Context Management

memory system LLM.name: claude-mem
memory system LLM.description: A long-term memory storage system for LLMs using the Model Context Protocol (MCP) standard. This system helps LLMs remember the context of work done over the entire history of a project, even across multiple sessions. It uses semantic search with embeddings to provide relevant context from past interactions and development decisions.

memory system LLM.name: MakerAi
memory system LLM.description: The AI Operating System for Delphi. 100% native framework with RAG 2.0 for knowledge retrieval, autonomous agents with semantic memory, visual workflow orchestration, and universal LLM connector. Supports OpenAI, Claude, Gemini, Ollama, and more. Enterprise-grade AI for Delphi 10.3+

memory system LLM.name: braindb
memory system LLM.description: Create a reliable memory system for AI agents that captures meaningful interactions, aiding recall and enriching user experience through semantic understanding.

memory system LLM.name: ClawIntelligentMemory
memory system LLM.description: 🧠 Manage and optimize AI assistant memories with a three-layer system for automated logging, analysis, and proactive learning.

memory system LLM.name: ktop
memory system LLM.description: 📊 Monitor system resources in terminal with detailed GPU, CPU, memory, network stats, and process tracking for hybrid LLM workloads.

memory system LLM.name: auto-skill
memory system LLM.description: 🤖 Enhance AI agents by auto-capturing, indexing, and reusing knowledge to build a self-evolving, memory-driven assistant system.

memory system LLM.name: fintech-ai-agent-playground
memory system LLM.description: Production-grade multi-agent AI system built with LangGraph,  Gemini 2.5 Flash & Groq. Implements ReAct, Tool Use, Reflection  & Memory agentic patterns for real-time fintech market research.  Auto LLM failover, query preprocessing & Streamlit deployment.

memory system LLM.name: memcloud
memory system LLM.description: ☁️ Harness nearby devices to create a distributed in-memory data store, pooling RAM for fast and ephemeral storage on macOS and Linux systems.
